summary: Calendar meeting alerts show once per group and stay until you close them.

changed: Overlapping meetings at the same start time share one alert and one notification instead of firing separately
A new meeting alert replaces any open reminder popup; sound plays once per group
Join meeting and Open calendar no longer dismiss the reminder — use Close or X
fixed: Calendar reminder popup no longer dismisses when clicking outside the dialog
Duplicate alert sounds from watchdog and system notifications for the same meeting group
